summary: User asked whether Portal Sifast can integrate with SIKAT legacy per docs/INTEGRASI_WITH_SIKAT.md. Analysis confirmed integration is architecturally feasible (shared session SSO on same domain via Nginx path routing) and the doc was written for this Laravel 12 + Inertia app. Current deployment is not yet integrated: different domain (portalsifast vs sikat), APP_NAME/cookie, database (portalsifast vs sikat), email login vs username, different User schema, and no legacy surat navbar. Prerequisites listed: DevOps/Nginx, shared APP_KEY, DB alignment, Fortify/login changes, frontend legacy nav with <a> tags, legacy team coordination.
current_status: Portal Sifast runs standalone on portalsifast.rsaisyiyahsitifatimah.com with email-based Fortify auth and portalsifast database. SIKAT Surat Menyurat SSO integration is documented but not implemented; requires infrastructure and auth/user alignment before frontend menu work.
